events: Kim Gong-ja realizes Ja Soo-jung's entire life is a trauma
Ja Soo-jung reveals she will enforce the Golden Ruler forever across the entire world
Ja Soo-jung admits she peeked into Kim Gong-ja's memories
Ja Soo-jung's expression becomes completely emotionless
loops: Kim Gong-ja has performed 4,000 days of regression
Ja Soo-jung's entire life consists of trauma/loops
cause_effect: Ja Soo-jung can see others' past -> she peeked into Kim Gong-ja's memories
Kim Gong-ja sees Ja Soo-jung's trauma -> realizes her entire life is trauma
Ja Soo-jung wants to enforce Golden Ruler -> plans to cover entire world eternally
chapters.notes: Ja Soo-jung plans to expand her rule beyond the kingdom to the entire world. Kim Gong-ja is revealed as Young Master of the Infernal Heavens and Moon of the Ivansia Family. Ja Soo-jung's eternal enforcement of the Golden Ruler is her ultimate goal.

events: The world shatters like a mirror revealing Ja Soo-jung's kaleidoscope world
Ja Soo-jung reveals this life is not her first life
Ja Soo-jung explains Dragon Bloodline and Dragon Emperor powers
Ja Soo-jung sits on the cracked throne
Ja Soo-jung gives Kim Gong-ja a white butterfly
Ja Soo-jung reveals Kim Gong-ja was killed by Yoo Soo-ha and had to kill him in return
deaths: Kim Gong-ja (killed by Yoo Soo-ha in the past)
Yoo Soo-ha (killed by Kim Gong-ja in the past)
loops: Ja Soo-jung has repeated her entire life countless times (billions of iterations)
This is not Ja Soo-jung's first life
cause_effect: Ja Soo-jung was not with Kim Gong-ja -> Kim Gong-ja was killed by Yoo Soo-ha -> Kim Gong-ja had to kill Yoo Soo-ha
Dragon Bloodline inheritance -> descendants possess minor copies of Dragon powers
chapters.notes: Critical revelation about Kim Gong-ja's death at Yoo Soo-ha's hands and the subsequent revenge. The world reflects on the butterfly's wings. Ja Soo-jung has lived through her entire life an uncountable number of times.

events: Ja Soo-jung warned Kim Gong-ja not to open the lock
Kim Gong-ja opens the lock and enters a vision of Yoo Soo-ha's past
Yoo Soo-ha wakes up in the Hope bar on Tower's 1st floor
Yoo Soo-ha reflects on his hatred-filled upbringing
Flashback to Ja Soo-jung managing a guild and recruiting a manager for Yoo Soo-ha
Banner hung recruiting manager for World Ranking Number 1 Hunter Yoo Soo-ha
loops: Kim Gong-ja opening the lock reveals a traumatic vision/memory of Yoo Soo-ha's past
cause_effect: Ja Soo-jung warns Kim Gong-ja -> Kim Gong-ja opens lock anyway -> receives vision of Yoo Soo-ha's past
Yoo Soo-ha's upbringing in a hatred-filled environment -> his personality and hatred of people
chapters.notes: The Hope bar uses Korean-style hops and has familiar beer brands. Yoo Soo-ha is revealed as World Ranking Number 1 S-rank Hunter known as 'The Tyrant of the Tower of Babel'. Ja Soo-jung was selecting a manager for Yoo Soo-ha in the past.
